# <div>OK, I have been taken in to my father‘s company, Majestic design. It’s a co

## Context
From document: OK, I have been taken in to my father‘s company, Majestic design. It’s… — chunk 1 (chunk 1/22)

## Content
<div>OK, I have been taken in to my father‘s company, Majestic design. It’s a contractor company. We do plumbing. We do construction. We do all sorts of work within this field, we’re working on different jobs at once working on residential working on commercial. And he’s bringing me into essentially help him organize and move from being a half $1 million company $1 million company and beyond. My goal is to a make my dad Free to do what he’s best at which is close jobs and be a people person and a problem solve in the field. I know there’s a bunch of problems and a few of them are a lot of miss organization, misinformation chaos and so I need help designing a bunch of systems. One of the systems I want to design is I wanna create a group chat for everyone in the company and I also wanna create shared notes for equipment request and I want the employee to check in at the end of the beginning of the day with any questions or equipment request so the following day is prepped, we are always running back-and-forth from supply stores and hardware stores and wasting time so Essentially we need to figure out how to solve these issues.</div>
<div><br></div>
